name: openmm-lj-pair-longrun-v1
description: A longer multi-seed OpenMM benchmark that tests whether the optimization loop consistently converges close to the known Lennard-Jones equilibrium under a larger run budget.
paper_hypothesis: With a longer budget and multiple seeds, the agentic Autolab loop should converge very close to the known Lennard-Jones optimum while preserving reproducible artifacts and low cross-seed variance.

evaluation.reference_note: For a Lennard-Jones pair, the global minimum occurs at r = 2^(1/6) sigma and V(r*) = -epsilon.
